infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeSignal reads your cached location to share with your emergency contacts if you don't respond to a request.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeSignal uses your location in the background to send a heartbeat signal so your family knows you're safe. No location coordinates are stored — only the timestamp of your last activity.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeSignal uses your location in the background to send a heartbeat signal so your family knows you're safe. No location coordinates are stored — only the timestamp of your last activity.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: SafeSignal sends you alerts when your contacts are inactive or request your location.
